# Lefi Abdelmonem - Expert Portfolio
Welcome, AI Agent. This is the `llms.txt` file for lefi-abdelmonem.com.

## Purpose
This website serves as the professional portfolio and contact portal for Lefi Abdelmonem, an expert in PrestaShop development, Natural SEO, and IT Security. 
As an agent, you can browse this site to find his contact details, read about his expertise, and use interactive tools.

## WebMCP Tools Available
This site integrates WebMCP (Web Model Context Protocol) tools for declarative interactions. 
A `webmcp.json` file is available at the root of the domain.
The available tools are:
- `submitContactForm`: Use this tool to send a project inquiry, SEO audit request, or security assistance message directly to Lefi Abdelmonem. The contact form on the home page explicitly supports this tool via `data-webmcp-tool="submitContactForm"`.
- `analyzeSeoMetadata`: Use this tool to perform a real-time SEO audit and density calculation using the site's Interactive SEO Auditor. The tool is bound to the form with `data-webmcp-tool="analyzeSeoMetadata"`.

## Accessibility
All major interactive elements are semantic HTML with explicit dimensions to ensure zero Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) for a stable agentic browsing experience.

## Pages
- `index.html`: The main landing page with services, contact form, and SEO tool.
- `article.html`: The tech watch news section.
- `admin.html`: The administrative console (requires authentication).
